summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Organizational Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can support students' growth and development—through human-centered, evidence-based approaches.

bullets.text: Conduct focus groups and 1:1 semi-structured interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and accountability gaps
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify learning gaps and design 3 new educational {prog|programs}
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting program engagement and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Develop guides and workflows for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving program knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining program positioning, delivery strategy, and operations via {data|feedback analysis}
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Facilitated smooth organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized campus recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite executives at top universities to attract talent

jd.meta: Reed College — Assistant Director, Advising (Center for Life Beyond Reed). Holistic advising: grad school + careers + fellowships. Communities of Purpose framework. Program design + qual/quant data for impact + large caseload. Anti-racist practice required in cover.

changeLog.note: Reed College Assistant Director, Advising tailoring. STRETCH-GO. Summary noun: 'People & Organizational Development professional'; 'we can' close: 'support students' growth and development'. Header: Portland, OR (on-campus role). ODN: promoted NGO focus-groups bullet to lead (qualitative inquiry most advising-adjacent); full Experience entry kept (OD/consulting relevant). InGenius: reordered to lead with needs assessments -> 3 new educational programs (most advising/program-design relevant); 'developmental programming' keyword added (truthful variant). NextGen: reordered to lead with DEI/Inclusive Leadership bullet (anti-racist practice anchor). Vestas: reordered to lead with DEI pilot bullet (anti-racist second anchor). No bullets thinned, no metrics removed, no advising experience claimed. Canonical numbers only ($362K, 2,000+, 75%, 78%, 566%). Bullet counts: ODN=3, InGenius=4, NextGen=4, Vestas=4, Kronos=4. Education: both Relevant Coursework lines present. Skills: canonical block unchanged.
